insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every new session is an opportunity to lay the foundation for success, and by focusing on building a consistent routine, you can establish a strong base to improve your scores and develop a growth mindset. By taking that first step and completing your initial session, you'll be able to break the ice, gain momentum, and start tracking your progress, which will help you identify areas of strength and weakness to inform your future learning strategy.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
